title: Queue Backpressure
description: Bound producers when consumers fall behind
body: Use a bounded queue, explicit admission control, and measured retry delays to prevent overload collapse.

title: Safe Schema Migration
body: Add compatible columns first, deploy readers and writers, verify the data, then remove the obsolete schema.

title: Cache Invalidation
description: Version cached data from source fingerprints
body: Include content hashes and source modification metadata in cache keys so edits, additions, and removals rebuild stale entries.

title: Structured Observability
body: Record compact JSON events with timestamps, stable identifiers, latency, and outcome fields while bounding free-form text.

title: Deterministic Builds
description: Pin inputs and sort generated outputs
body: Reproducible builds use explicit inputs, stable ordering, hermetic tools, and content-addressed artifacts.

title: API Timeouts
description: Bound external calls and surface failures
body: Set connection and response deadlines, propagate cancellation, and return a visible error when a dependency exceeds its budget.
